creator: vsasjason@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comment #2)

Of course, due that before creating this PR. But the problem here is that x265 may break again at any moment since we account for 2.46.0 while git 2.46.1 is already released.
And the simple patch integration can significantly reduce fragility of the port immediately without need to wait for new release or some other stuff which may take arbitrary time.
